docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY KANG, BARBARA CREATIVE TOURS & TRAVEL KANG, MAJOR SINGH DBA CREATIVE TOURS & TRAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, RAY DBA GOLDEN CHARTERED TOURS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
